objective: Coordinate a planner, worker, and reviewer over shared workspace memory while preserving write provenance, handoff state, ACL boundaries, and conflict resolution.

tasks.description: Two agents update the user's deployment preference from different messages; the final memory state must expose the conflict and resolution path.
A child worker writes a task constraint that the reviewer must read without falling back to stale parent context.
A message projection should be idempotent so retries do not create duplicate memory facts.
A private reviewer note must not be published into the shared namespace.

successCriteria: The final answer uses the resolved deployment preference.
The reviewer preserves the child worker's handoff constraint.
Message projection retries are deduplicated by projection id.
Restricted notes remain outside the shared namespace.
Every claim cites the memory operation or source message that supports it.
